title: Request Targets, Host Authority, Proxy Trust, and Client Identity · Inference Brief: Authority Redaction Evidence
summary: An origin trusts arbitrary Host and X-Forwarded values, builds reset links from the request, rate-limits the proxy address, and logs raw URLs containing secrets. Planned artifact: Add and verify the httpsts authority redaction evidence increment in request authority and trusted-proxy decision record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Record bounded route, request ID, trusted peer, and redacted target evidence without logging credentials, tokens, personal data, or unbounded query values.
Traverse Forwarded or X-Forwarded chains from the trusted socket boundary and reject malformed, excessive, or topology-inconsistent claims.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Node and Express server Predict Authority Redaction Evidence · Theory Authority Redaction Evidence
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory team handles case 9053 in a multi-tenant case service with a bounded PostgreSQL pool. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to derive authority only across an explicit trusted-proxy and host allow-list boundary; reject a replay before any external effect; then reuse an idempotency key with different input and reject the fingerprint mismatch. Browser code models pure decisions only. Node, Express, listener, TLS, PostgreSQL, proxy, worker, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Authority Redaction Evidence contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: Node and Express server Predict Authority Redaction Evidence · Theory Authority Redaction Evidence.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for record bounded route, request id, trusted peer, and redacted target evidence without logging credentials, tokens, personal data, or unbounded query values. For Node and Express server Predict Authority Redaction Evidence · Theory Authority Redaction Evidence, keep Authority Redaction Evidence connected to executable HTTP client decision evidence.

steps.title: Node and Express server Build Authority Redaction Evidence · Theory Authority Redaction Evidence
